CustomField.description: Select how interest is calculated for this contract. Previous Balance: Interest is calculated based on the balance at the start of the day. Adjusted Balance: Interest is calculated based on the balance at the end of the day, after any transactions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select how interest is calculated for this contract. Previous Balance: Interest is calculated based on the balance at the start of the day. Adjusted Balance: Interest is calculated based on the balance at the end of the day, after any transactions.
CustomField.label: Interest Calculation Method
